title: Resolve Workspace Dependencies
description: Resolves workspace dependencies and updates the package.json file with the resolved versions.

source.description: The source manifest file where the workspace dependencies are declared. If not specified, the executor will use the manifest in the project root.

destination.description: The manifest file to write resolved dependency versions to. If not specified, the executor will attempt to find a manifest in the project's build output.

resolvedVersionPrefix.description: The prefix to use when writing resolved versions to the destination manifest.
